profile.name: Gaurav Ravindra Kadam
profile.title: Software Developer | Backend Developer | Java & Django Developer
profile.bio: Computer Science postgraduate student with hands-on experience in full-stack web and mobile application development using Django REST Framework, React.js, PostgreSQL, and AWS. Skilled in designing RESTful APIs, developing scalable backend systems, and managing relational and NoSQL databases. Strong foundation in Java, Python, C, and C++, with practical experience contributing to production-grade applications during industry training and internships. Passionate about Backend Development, Java Ecosystem technologies, Cloud Computing, and Software Engineering.

projects.title: Kho-Kho Scoring System
projects.description: Developed and deployed a full-stack mobile-based Kho-Kho match management and scoring system with Django REST Framework APIs, PostgreSQL integration, umpire authentication, role-based access control, and backend services deployed on AWS.

projects.title: Daily Collection Management System
projects.description: Developed a finance management web application for daily savings collection and loan tracking, including customer management, EMI tracking, reporting, payment modules, Firebase Firestore integration, Cloudinary media support, and a responsive user interface.

projects.title: AI-Based Digital Learning Platform
projects.description: Ongoing AI-powered educational platform for rural students featuring OCR-based syllabus extraction, multilingual content generation, personalized learning paths, and offline accessibility.

certifications.title: Applied learning across AI, content creation, and project delivery.
certifications.description: Certifications that support practical software development, AI fluency, and professional project execution.

hero.description: I build RESTful APIs, scalable backend systems, and responsive full-stack applications with Java, Django, React.js, PostgreSQL, and AWS.

about.title: Building scalable backend systems and practical full-stack products.
about.description: Computer Science postgraduate student with hands-on experience across Django REST Framework, React.js, PostgreSQL, Firebase, and AWS. I focus on clean APIs, reliable data models, authentication workflows, and production-ready application features.

timeline.description: Developed REST APIs using Django REST Framework, designed and managed PostgreSQL databases, implemented authentication and role-based access control, worked on backend architecture for the Kho-Kho Scoring System, and assisted deployment and production-readiness activities.
